title: Add few-shot examples to ticket-breakdown prompts
source: Few-shot prompting best practice — 2-4 curated examples raise output consistency more than instructions alone
description: Ticket generation quality (granularity, acceptance criteria, sizing) varies run-to-run because the prompt is zero-shot. Embedding 2-3 canonical example tickets (a well-scoped one, a split-required one, and a rejected too-vague one) anchors the model to the house style and reduces oversized or underspecified tickets.
proposed_changes: Create a `TICKET_FEWSHOT` constant in ticket.py holding 3 example (input feature → output ticket JSON) pairs wrapped in <example> tags, including one 'this is too vague, split it' negative example. Inject it into the breakdown prompt in orchestrate.py before the actual feature description. Keep examples short (≤120 tokens each) to limit prompt bloat.
